overview: Professional transport and logistics company website for SafeMove Transport, featuring a hero section, services showcase, about/why choose us section, contact details, and footer with brand colors (dark navy and orange).
features: Hero section with company name, tagline, and CTA
Services showcase (Goods Transportation, Safe & Secure, On Time Delivery, All India Service)
Contact section with phone, email, and address
Brand-consistent navy and orange color scheme
